title: ixeris strigosa
intro: Ixeris strigosa, also known as the prickly lettuce or rough lettuce, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family and is native to Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Its health benefits include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Ixeris strigosa can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves and roots can also be consumed raw or cooked for added nutrition.
